title: cestichis microblepharon
intro: Cestichis microblepharon, also known as the 'Eyelash Plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat conjunctivitis, eye infections, and other eye-related issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions, which are believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall eye health. In addition, Cestichis microblepharon has been used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
